metric_definitions.WinnableLoss: Dem candidates who lost by <5% in 2022 (14 Dems)
metric_definitions.PivotK5: Dems in 5 closest R-won 2022 races (CO-3, CA-13, MI-10, IA-3, AZ-6)

verdict: OPTION 2 (comp-only headline). Stakes does not improve any pivotal-flavor metric — comp-only ties or beats comp*stakes on all four definitions tried. Impact (with need) is uniformly worst.
note: Multiplicative combine compresses correlated sub-scores; stakes is methodologically interesting but kept for completeness / per-candidate detail panel, not headline.
